Monogram
New small size Praphy shoulder bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FEND1] decorated at the bottom. The bag's silhouette follows the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when carried on the shoulder.

items.name_cn:
Monogram
Latest Monogram Boston 365 Boston bag is here!
In this season's collaboration with Milan designer Stefano Pilati, my favorite bag is this one. Fully enclosed magnetic opening, practical and private, suitable for daily commuting, travel, sports, and all occasions.
I have to say this bag is really spacious, with super strong practicality!
Model: Pillow bag Monogram

items.name_cn:
Monogram Medium
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.\>The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.\>The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.\>Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 33×16×15cm

items.name_cn:
Monogram Small
Dior D-journey Handbag
Don't tell me you still don't know about this? It's gone viral, girls.
Dior has truly mastered the art of "effortless chic" this year.
I have to say the new D-journey is absolutely stunning.
The difficulty to buy is no less than the series; I'm exaggerating, haha.
A casual yet high-end street style, completely changing the previous sweet vibe.
The key is its versatile shoulder strap; all three carrying methods look good.
The large leather pull tab paired with the side pockets adds more personality.
Decorated with a vintage metal Christian Dior logo, it's both decorative and practical.
Dimensions: 25.5×14.5×14cm

items.name_en: Monogram vintage backpack is here! I really love the combination of metal buckle elements and the monogram. Practical, retro, and beautiful all in one, the capacity really surprised me, it can satisfy short business trips. You really can't find this feeling in current backpacks, vintage styles are truly the best.

items.name_cn:
MONTAIGNE Chain Bag
M9208
The M 30 Montaigne product line is inspired by 30 Montaigne, highlighting the classic identity. This handbag is exquisitely decorated with Oblique jacquard fabric, creating an elegant and classic look. The flap is adorned with a vintage gold-finish metal CD clasp, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle. Elegant details such as the '30 Montaigne' embossed logo on the back highlight the fashionable design. It comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, allowing it to be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody.
Dimensions: 25 x 16.5 x 8 cm

items.name_en: MONTSOURIS Backpack Series M45501# Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
MONTSOURIS Backpack Series M45501# Uninspected Version
❐ Size: 27.5*33*14cm ❐
The Montsouris small backpack features a classic Monogram pattern paired with a drawstring design, exuding a classic vibe. The classic backpack silhouette is enhanced with an additional handle design, adding a vintage charm. The large capacity makes it a must-have for daily styling and a travel essential!
